import resolveUri from '@jridgewell/resolve-uri'; import stripFilename from './strip-filename'; type Resolve = (source: string | null) => string; export default function resolver( mapUrl: string | null | undefined, sourceRoot: string | undefined, ): Resolve { const from = stripFilename(mapUrl); // The sourceRoot is always treated as a directory, if it's not empty. // https://github.com/mozilla/source-map/blob/8cb3ee57/lib/util.js#L327 // https://github.com/chromium/chromium/blob/da4adbb3/third_party/blink/renderer/devtools/front_end/sdk/SourceMap.js#L400-L401 const prefix = sourceRoot ? sourceRoot + '/' : ''; return (source) => resolveUri(prefix + (source || ''), from); }
